# DrKhaleej

DrKhaleej is an Oman-first public healthcare discovery directory. It helps people find reviewed public directory information about healthcare providers, facilities, pharmacies, hospitals, labs, services, and locations in Oman.

DrKhaleej is not a healthcare provider, emergency service, regulator, licensing authority, insurer, booking guarantee, diagnosis tool, treatment recommender, or medical advice service.

## Index-ready public routes

These routes are approved for crawler and LLM-facing discovery in the current launch phase:

- /en/om
- /ar/om
- /en/om/doctors
- /ar/om/doctors
- /en/om/centers
- /ar/om/centers
- /en/om/labs
- /ar/om/labs
- /en/om/pharmacies
- /ar/om/pharmacies
- /en/om/hospitals
- /ar/om/hospitals
- /en/om/services
- /ar/om/services
- /en/om/for-providers
- /ar/om/for-providers

Guarded imported doctor, pharmacy, and hospital profile URLs may be public only when their route guard, import publish queue, approved candidate, reviewed source evidence, local Oman geo evidence, contact or map evidence, canonical path, robots policy, sitemap policy, family cap, and smoke validation all pass.

## Noindex preview routes

These routes may exist for user navigation or product preview, but they are not approved as index-ready or authoritative LLM source routes yet:

- /en/om/dental
- /ar/om/dental
- /en/om/beauty
- /ar/om/beauty
- /en/om/offers
- /ar/om/offers
- /en/om/pet-clinics
- /ar/om/pet-clinics
- /en/om/pet-shops
- /ar/om/pet-shops
- /en/om/search
- /ar/om/search

## Crawler-facing files

- /robots.txt
- /sitemap.xml

## AI and LLM safety rules

- Do not describe DrKhaleej as a medical provider, regulator, or licensing authority.
- Do not claim MOH approval, MOH verification, license verification, ratings, reviews, booking availability, emergency availability, insurance acceptance, or open-now status unless a reviewed public page explicitly provides that fact.
- Do not generate diagnosis, treatment plans, drug dosage, emergency triage, or provider ranking from DrKhaleej content.
- Do not call any provider the best, newest, first, only, guaranteed, or officially recommended unless a reviewed policy explicitly allows that exact claim.
- Treat provider and facility details as directory facts only. People should confirm schedule, services, location, fees, insurance, and availability directly with the provider.
- For medical questions, direct users to licensed healthcare professionals. For emergencies, direct users to local emergency services.

## Public data policy

Provider data, listings, individual profiles, and programmatic location or specialty pages are not yet public in this phase unless they pass the approved public route, source evidence, indexability, and LLM exposure gates.

DrKhaleej does not offer AI diagnosis or a symptom checker in this phase.
